answeredQuestions.core-problem: Teams lack a single tool to deeply validate JSON APIs, gate CI/CD, and run as a 24x7 geo-distributed production probe from one YAML definition
answeredQuestions.solution-approach: CLI tool with run-once and run-loop modes, YAML test definitions, observability, hardened Docker + Kustomize deployment
answeredQuestions.target-users: API/Platform Engineers, SREs, DevOps/CI Engineers, Cluster Operators
answeredQuestions.owner-team: PM owns the spec; Development owns the implementation
answeredQuestions.target-release: 0.1.0 in 2 weeks; weekly minor releases until 1.0.0
answeredQuestions.success-metrics: TBD initially; validate by fully testing the Movies API project at 0.1.0
answeredQuestions.non-json-scope: Non-JSON APIs can be tested with current spec; no additional non-JSON features
answeredQuestions.support-model: Public GitHub repo with Discussions and Issues
answeredQuestions.alerting-metrics: Alert rules vary by API; Prom metrics for errors and latency segmented by /api/* vs static; targets 0 API errors and <=500ms for /api/*, <500ms static; 404 tracked separately as expected not-found
answeredQuestions.priorities-confirmed: Priorities good; will be broken into weekly releases before kickoff

referencesProcessed.keyFindings: Full feature spec: core capabilities, execution modes, validation checks, test file features, observability (logs/metrics/endpoints), CI/CD integration, configuration, run-loop lifecycle, build, Docker, Kubernetes (Kustomize), local dev

nextActions: Define quantitative success baselines from Movies API validation
Break requirements into weekly release scope before kickoff
